prompt: A moody 4-by-3 photo collage made of 12 candid smartphone-style snapshots of a young couple during summer nights in Tokyo, shot with a nostalgic film look, soft grain, muted colors, slight blur, low contrast, dim ambient street lighting, and intimate casual framing. The overall tone is romantic, youthful, private, and documentary-like, with a warm gray-brown palette and a slightly desaturated teal-orange night city atmosphere. The man has messy dark hair, a slim build, and wears a dark overshirt or lightweight jacket over a white T-shirt; the woman has long dark brown hair, a slim build, and wears a white sleeveless top with thin black shoulder straps from a bag. In every panel, both faces are intentionally obscured by large soft-edged blur blocks for anonymity. Include exactly 12 images arranged in a tight seamless grid: top row panel 1, an extreme close-up side profile of the man at night; panel 2, the woman taking a mirror or phone selfie while standing beside the man outdoors at night; panel 3, the couple pressed close together near a street sign with Japanese text; panel 4, the couple kissing at a busy crosswalk in the city. Middle row panel 5, a pavement shadow photo of two people, one making a peace sign; panel 6, the couple standing close on a sidewalk in an urban shopping street; panel 7, a sunset skyline over water with Tokyo Tower visible, no people; panel 8, a high-angle shot looking down on the woman and the man close together on stairs or a walkway. Bottom row panel 9, a tight intimate close-up of the couple touching faces or kissing; panel 10, the man adjusting or touching the woman's hair on a city street; panel 11, the couple riding together on a scooter or motorcycle, both wearing helmets, captured in motion blur; panel 12, the couple embracing against a pale blue sky, framed from the shoulders up. Backgrounds should include Japanese city streets, storefronts, crosswalks, signage, buildings, night traffic, and urban evening ambience. Keep the composition casual and imperfect like real memories, with varied crops, soft focus, motion blur, and authentic handheld phone photography.
